nasb.text: Jeroboam’s wife did so, and arose and went to Shiloh, and came to the house of Ahijah. Now Ahijah could not see, for his eyes were dim because of his age.

esv.text: Jeroboam’s wife did so. She arose and went to Shiloh and came to the house of Ahijah. Now Ahijah could not see, for his eyes were dim because of his age.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安的妻子就這樣行了。她動身往示羅去，到了亞希雅的家；亞希雅因為年紀老邁，眼睛昏花，不能看見。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安的妻子就照他的话做，前往示罗，来到亚希雅家。那时亚希雅因年纪老迈，眼睛已失明。
